source.name: Lab 0.1: Pipeline Config and Endpoints
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks** for the two files that differ from Chapter 1.3 (`level3/`). This matches **Unit 0.2** and the course **`level4/`** tree. When every blank is correct, **copy Part A** into `level4/config.yml` and **Part B** into `level4/endpoints.yml` (create or replace those files), **save**, then run the **Code Test** below.
source.text:
Complete the Chapter 1.4 pipeline files.

**Part A — config.yml** (save as `level4/config.yml`)

```yaml
recipe: default.v1
language: en
assistant_id: <<<level4-agent>>>

pipeline:
  - name: <<<CompactLLMCommandGenerator>>>
    llm:
      model_group: <<<gpt-4o-mini>>>
    minimize_num_calls: <<<false>>>
    flow_retrieval:
      turns_to_embed: <<<5>>>
      num_flows: <<<20>>>

policies:
  - name: <<<FlowPolicy>>>
```

**Part B — endpoints.yml** (save as `level4/endpoints.yml`)

```yaml
action_endpoint:
  actions_module: <<<actions>>>

nlg:
  type: <<<rephrase>>>
  llm:
    model_group: <<<gpt-4o-mini>>>

model_groups:
  - id: <<<gpt-4o-mini>>>
    models:
      - provider: <<<openai>>>
        model: <<<gpt-4o-2024-11-20>>>
        temperature: <<<0.1>>>
```
source.distractors:
level3-agent
SearchReadyLLMCommandGenerator
true
1
10
MemoizationPolicy
actions_module
paraphrase
gpt-4o
azure
gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18
0.3
source.guidance:
**Config:** `assistant_id` is **`level4-agent`**; command generator is **`CompactLLMCommandGenerator`** (not SearchReady). **`minimize_num_calls: false`**; **`flow_retrieval`** uses **`turns_to_embed: 5`**, **`num_flows: 20`**; **`FlowPolicy`** under **`policies:`**.

**Endpoints:** `actions_module` **`actions`** (YAML string; quotes optional); **`nlg`** **`type: rephrase`**; **`model_group`** / **`id`** **`gpt-4o-mini`** (label shared with config); under that group **`model: gpt-4o-2024-11-20`**, **`temperature: 0.1`**.

Paste into `level4/config.yml` and `level4/endpoints.yml`, then run the **Code Test**.
